dev_ecosystem.repos_building_on: NOT_AVAILABLE_FREE_TIER — Electric Capital's per-protocol breakdown requires paid access; only aggregate DeFi figures are in the free public report PDF

switching_cost_analysis: Switching costs are moderate-to-high for large integrators (wallets, aggregators, institutional desks) because Aave's battle-tested audits, multi-chain deployments across 12+ networks, GHO stablecoin composability, and deep liquidity create significant re-integration and re-audit overhead, but retail users face near-zero friction via aggregators like DeFi Saver or Instadapp that abstract the underlying protocol.
rationale: Aave holds the #1 TVL position in DeFi lending (~$11.2B as of July 2025) with a roughly 34% share of total lending TVL across all chains, giving it a durable liquidity network effect that compounds as more collateral types and chains are added. Its moat is reinforced by the GHO stablecoin (native demand sink), Aave v3 efficiency mode, and a large, active governance community (>170k AAVE stakers in the Safety Module), making it costly for institutional integrators to migrate. Regulatory risk is broadly similar to peers — all major DeFi lending protocols face the same unresolved questions around KYC/AML and potential securities classification — though Aave's Lens Protocol social layer and GHO introduce incremental surface area.
sources: https://defillama.com/protocols/lending — TVL rankings and market share, accessed 2025-07-10
https://defillama.com/protocol/aave — Aave TVL breakdown by chain, accessed 2025-07-10
https://github.com/aave — Aave GitHub org (repo count proxy), accessed 2025-07-10
https://electriccapital.com/developerreport — Electric Capital 2024 Developer Report (free PDF); per-protocol MAD data NOT available on free tier
https://tokenterminal.com/terminal/projects/aave — Token Terminal Aave page; 30d revenue figures require paid subscription for precise values; estimate derived from public fee dashboards
https://governance.aave.com — Aave governance forum, Safety Module staker data, accessed 2025-07-10
